功能单位或基准流中的 referenceToReferenceFlow 指向输入/输出交换的内部ID，不是投影表显示序号；当前已匹配内部ID 15 的基准流，不应按显示序号判定基准流错位。
已识别基准输出流及结果量；定量产品或过程属性缺失可作为建议补充，但在基准输出和数量已明确时不应单独作为必改或不通过理由。
输入/输出已读取：输入 27 条，输出 26 条。

categories.name: 过程信息

基本名称.zh: 加氢裂化(HC)重石脑油生产

处理、标准、路线.zh: 废渣油原料，Axens单段/两段加氢裂化工艺
处理、标准、路线.en: Residue oil feedstock, Axens single-stage/two-stage hydrocracking process

数据集一般性说明.zh: 石脑油是石油产品之一，又叫化工轻油、粗汽油，是以原油或其他原料加工生产的用于化工原料的轻质油，主要用作化工原料。本数据集描述了基于废渣油原料的加氢裂化工艺生产重石脑油的过程，涵盖1#加氢裂化装置、2#加氢裂化装置和沸腾床渣油加氢装置的联合工艺流程。该工艺利用减压渣油、焦化蜡油等重质油料，通过加氢脱硫、脱氮及裂化反应，制得重石脑油作为主要产品，适用于连续重整装置原料。数据集包括原料组成、工艺参数、能源消耗、污染物排放等关键信息，符合生命周期评价（LCA）和ILCD命名规范要求。
数据集一般性说明.en: Naphtha is one of the petroleum products, also known as chemical light oil or crude gasoline. It is a light oil processed from crude oil or other raw materials and used as a chemical raw material, mainly serving as a chemical raw material. This dataset describes the process of producing heavy naphtha through the hydrocracking process based on waste residue oil as raw material, covering the combined process flow of the No. 1 hydrocracking unit, No. 2 hydrocracking unit, and the fluidized bed residue oil hydrocracking unit. This process utilizes heavy oil materials such as vacuum residue oil and coking wax oil, and through hydrogenation desulfurization, denitrification, and cracking reactions, heavy naphtha is produced as the main product, suitable for use as the raw material of continuous reforming units. The dataset includes key information such as raw material composition, process parameters, energy consumption, and pollutant emissions, and complies with the requirements of the Life Cycle Assessment (LCA) and ILCD naming conventions.

分类.name: Manufacture of coke and refined petroleum products
Manufacture of refined petroleum products; manufacture of fossil fuel products
Manufacture of refined petroleum products; manufacture of fossil fuel products

产品或工艺的技术用途.zh: 加氢裂化重石脑油主要用于连续重整装置的原料，进一步用于芳烃和高辛烷值汽油的生产；也可作为乙烯裂解原料，用于石化产业链下游化学品的合成。该产品具有低硫、低氮特性，适用于清洁燃料和化工原料的高效制备。
产品或工艺的技术用途.en: Hydrocracked heavy naphtha serves primarily as feedstock for continuous reforming units, used in the production of aromatics and high-octane gasoline. It can also be used as feedstock for ethylene cracking, supporting downstream chemical synthesis in the petrochemical industry. The product features low sulfur and nitrogen content, making it suitable for efficient production of clean fuels and chemical raw materials.

技术描述及背景系统.zh: 加氢裂化重石脑油生产采用Axens公司的加氢裂化技术，包括三种工艺装置：1#加氢裂化装置采用单段一次通过流程，以直馏蜡油为原料，主要产品为重石脑油和航煤；2#加氢裂化装置采用两段全循环流程，处理多种蜡油和柴油，生产轻重石脑油和尾油；沸腾床渣油加氢装置采用H-Oil技术，处理高硫渣油，转化率高达80%。整个系统以新氢、循环氢为反应介质，结合分馏塔进行产品分离。工艺流程包括反应、分馏、脱硫、催化剂再生等关键步骤，形成一个完整的重油轻质化系统。
技术描述及背景系统.en: The production of heavy naphtha from hydrocracking uses Axens company's hydrocracking technology, which includes three process units: The #1 hydrocracking unit adopts a single-pass one-stage process, using straight-run wax oil as raw material, with main products being heavy naphtha and jet fuel; The #2 hydrocracking unit employs a two-stage full recycle process, processing various wax oils and diesel to produce light and heavy naphtha and tail oil; The fluidized bed residue hydroprocessing unit uses H-Oil technology, treating high-sulfur residue oil with a conversion rate as high as 80%. The entire system uses fresh hydrogen and recycle hydrogen as the reaction media, combined with fractionation towers for product separation. The process flow includes key steps such as reaction, fractionation, desulfurization, and catalyst regeneration, forming a complete heavy oil upgrading system.

missingFields: 运营、供应或生产子地点

数据切断和完整性原则.zh: 模型数据遵循生命周期评价的数据完整性原则，纳入主要环境影响显著的投入产出要素，包括原料油、氢气、电耗、蒸汽等高占比因子。辅助材料如缓蚀剂、阻垢剂等用量较小且环境影响较低的物料被合理切断。数据来源包括工艺流程设计、实际运行记录、物料平衡与排放监测，确保数据准确性和代表性，符合ILCD与ISO 14040系列标准要求。
数据切断和完整性原则.en: The model data adheres to the principle of data integrity in life cycle assessment, incorporating input and output factors with significant environmental impacts, such as raw oil, hydrogen, electricity consumption, and steam, which account for a high proportion. Auxiliary materials with low usage and minor environmental impacts, such as corrosion inhibitors and scale inhibitors, are reasonably excluded. Data sources include process design, actual operation records, material balance, and emission monitoring, ensuring the accuracy and representativeness of the data, in compliance with ILCD and ISO 14040 series standards.

categories.name: 管理信息

预期应用.zh: 本数据集可用于生命周期评价研究，量化重油加氢裂化工艺的环境影响，支持与传统重石脑油生产工艺的碳足迹对比分析；在工程应用中，可为工艺优化、设备选型、能源配置及资源综合利用提供数据支撑；在政策与规划层面，可用于清洁生产审核、绿色工厂认证、循环经济园区评估及碳交易机制设计；同时，也可服务于企业绿色供应链管理、可持续产品设计及环境产品声明（EPD）编制。
预期应用.en: This dataset can be utilized for life cycle assessment research to quantify the environmental impact of heavy oil hydrocracking processes and support comparative carbon footprint analysis with traditional heavy naphtha production processes. In engineering applications, it provides data support for process optimization, equipment selection, energy configuration, and comprehensive resource utilization. At the policy and planning level, it can be applied to clean production audits, green factory certification, circular economy park evaluations, and carbon trading mechanism design. Additionally, it serves corporate green supply chain management, sustainable product design, and the preparation of Environmental Product Declarations (EPDs).

fields.许可类型: Free of charge for all users and uses

en: HC crude liquefied gas; Crude oil undergoes atmospheric distillation at 30-180℃ for light hydrocarbon fractions → condensation and liquefaction; Production mixing takes place in the factory

rows.流:
zh: HC干气; 干气预处理除杂→变压吸附分离提氢→氢气提纯，工业氢气标准（GB/T 3634.1-2006）; 生产混合，在工厂
en: HC dry gas; Dry gas pretreatment for impurity removal → pressure swing adsorption separation for hydrogen extraction → Hydrogen purification, industrial hydrogen standard (GB/T 3634.1-2006); Production mixing takes place in the factory
